purpose: Read the view names in the drawing sheet and updates the Drawing Title. Can be used for GA, Shop and Precast Drawings.

Content: Multiple views are created in each drawing sheet. Especially in GA Drawing, it is highly preferred to add the view names to drawing title for easy recognition of the drawing sheet. This application exactly reads all the view names and copies them to the Drawing Title1. It makes the detailer job much easier and saves time. This application can also be used for Shop and Precast drawings

download_process: Once You purchase the tool, a link will be sent to your mail to download.
installation_process: Double click on the installation Package
System will show installed Tekla Versions on your system
Choose the version(s) to be installed.
Close the Application. (Do not Delete the File)
It will be queued for the installation when Tekla is open next time.
Application will be installed before opening the software.
Search for Drawing View Names under Application and Components.
Let the Application automate the manual process.
